description: Compact ISO C99 wide scanf alias fixture coverage for __isoc99_fwscanf, __isoc99_swscanf, and va_list wide scanf wrappers.
spec_reference: ISO C99 scanf family, POSIX <wchar.h> wide scanf behavior, glibc __isoc99_* compatibility aliases

cases.name: isoc99_swscanf_parses_wide_integer
cases.spec_section: ISO C99 __isoc99_swscanf wide string input conversion

cases.name: isoc99_fwscanf_null_stream_fails_closed
cases.note: Bound to isoc_abi.rs __isoc99_fwscanf source forwarding and wchar_abi_test::wide_vscanf_null_va_list_fails_closed base vfwscanf behavior.

cases.name: isoc99_vswscanf_null_va_list_fails_closed
cases.note: Bound to isoc_abi.rs __isoc99_vswscanf source forwarding and wchar_abi_test::wide_vscanf_null_va_list_fails_closed base vswscanf behavior.

cases.name: isoc99_vfwscanf_null_stream_and_va_list_fails_closed
cases.spec_section: ISO C99 __isoc99_vfwscanf stream and va_list rejection
cases.note: Bound to isoc_abi.rs __isoc99_vfwscanf source forwarding and wchar_abi_test::wide_vscanf_null_va_list_fails_closed base vfwscanf behavior.

cases.name: isoc99_vwscanf_null_va_list_fails_closed
cases.note: Bound to isoc_abi.rs __isoc99_vwscanf source forwarding and wchar_abi_test::wide_vscanf_null_va_list_fails_closed base vwscanf behavior.
